creator: wayne@barnes1.wustl.edu
text:
/usr/share/examples/etc/README.examples
seems to think it is in a directory with a lot of nice examples, but
this directory is nearly bare.
Most of the material listed in README.examples is actually in
/usr/src/etc
                 but the README.examples list is out of date, also.

Fix: 

Edit README.examples to send the user to the proper directory,
	and while you're at it, make it more complete.
	I.e. include rc.conf.
